description: SQL injection vulnerability in thumbnails.php in Coppermine Photo Gallery (CPG) 1.3.x allows remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL commands via a cpg131_fav cookie.  NOTE: it was later reported that 1.4.10, 1.4.14, and other 1.4.x versions are also affected using similar cookies.
